title: armoracia macrocarpa
intro: Armoracia macrocarpa, also known as the large horseradish, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve congestion, thanks to its high levels of isothiocyanates, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Armoracia macrocarpa include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support the immune system and aid in detoxification. Armoracia macrocarpa is often prepared as a root extract, tincture, or infused in tea, and can also be used as a fresh root or added to sauces and salads for its pungent flavor and medicinal benefits.
